Package global.thalion.ttio

Record Class Feature

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
global.thalion.ttio.Feature
Record Components:
featureId - Identifier unique within the file.
runName - Acquisition run this feature lives in.
chemicalEntity - Peptide sequence, CHEBI accession, chemical name, or formula.
retentionTimeSeconds - Apex retention time in seconds.
expMassToCharge - Experimental precursor m/z.
charge - Precursor charge state.
adductIon - Adduct annotation (e.g. [M+H]1+); empty for proteomics peptide features.
abundances - Per-sample abundances keyed by sample/study-variable label.
evidenceRefs - References that support this feature (e.g. SME_ID values for metabolomics, spectra_ref entries for proteomics).
public record Feature(String featureId, String runName, String chemicalEntity, double retentionTimeSeconds, double expMassToCharge, int charge, String adductIon, Map<String,Double> abundances, List<String> evidenceRefs) extends Record
A feature-level observation: a peak detected in one run, with retention time + m/z + charge + per-sample abundances.

Feature sits between Identification (spectrum-level) and Quantification (entity-level): it is the row-level record required by mzTab's PEP section (peptide-level quantification in the 1.0 proteomics dialect) and by mzTab-M's SMF/SME sections (small-molecule feature + evidence in the 2.0.0-M metabolomics dialect).

API status: Provisional (v0.12.0 M78).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOFeature, Python ttio.feature.Feature.

  • Constructor Details

    • Feature

      public Feature(String featureId, String runName, String chemicalEntity, double retentionTimeSeconds, double expMassToCharge, int charge, String adductIon, Map<String,Double> abundances, List<String> evidenceRefs)
      Creates an instance of a Feature record class.
      Parameters:
      featureId - the value for the featureId record component
      runName - the value for the runName record component
      chemicalEntity - the value for the chemicalEntity record component
      retentionTimeSeconds - the value for the retentionTimeSeconds record component
      expMassToCharge - the value for the expMassToCharge record component
      charge - the value for the charge record component
      adductIon - the value for the adductIon record component
      abundances - the value for the abundances record component
      evidenceRefs - the value for the evidenceRefs record component

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static Feature of(String featureId, String runName, String chemicalEntity)
      Minimal constructor; defaults apply to numeric fields and containers.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
